notes: Single-theorem file proving Silverman III.6.2(d): the dual isogeny of [n] equals [n], using isogDual_mulByInt_of_comp + mulByInt_comp_eq_mul + mulByInt_degree. No file in the repo imports this module, so isogDual_mulByInt is a dead-code candidate at the module level (though it may be intended as a standalone result). No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, proof is 6 lines.
